title: Software Engineer - Backend
score_reasoning: You comfortably exceed the 2+ years experience requirement with 7 years of backend development, and your Go proficiency directly matches the role's stated preference for Java, Scala, or Go. Your hands-on distributed systems experience aligns well with the infrastructure and platform engineering focus. Aarhus is in Denmark, within your acceptable European region (~±2-3h timezone overlap with Berlin). However, this role is entry-to-mid-level and emphasizes foundational platform work with "guidance from senior team members," representing a material step down from your current senior-level responsibilities and leadership scope at Velox. The posting does not explicitly state whether work is remote or on-site; Aarhus proximity creates geographic ambiguity. Databricks' strong brand and infrastructure-focused work support growth potential, but the seniority misalignment is notable.

red_flags: Mid-level role requiring guidance from seniors; you are currently senior-level with multi-team scope
Location is Aarhus, Denmark—not Berlin; hybrid/remote status unclear in posting
Lower seniority position than your current level
Focus on foundational platform work may not fully leverage your architecture and leadership experience
